summary: Iteration 4 testing completed: Excel preview endpoint, layout_id migration, and enhanced upload flow all working correctly. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All upload flow features working as expected.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/import-layouts/preview-excel - Default config returns abas, cabecalhos, linhas, totals
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/import-layouts/preview-excel - Custom config (linha_cabecalho=0, linha_inicio_dados=1, max_linhas=3)
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/import-layouts/preview-excel - Sheet selection by nome_aba
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/import-layouts/preview-excel - Invalid base64 returns 400
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/lotes/estatisticas - Returns total and por_status
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/lotes - Listing works after layout_id migration
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/lotes with layout_id=null accepted
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/lotes with valid layout_id creates link
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/lotes/{id} returns layout_id field
✅ Backend: /api/health endpoint working
✅ Frontend: Upload page loads with steps: 1. Arquivo Excel, 2. Dados do Lote
✅ Frontend: File upload triggers Step 3: Layout de Importação section
✅ Frontend: Excel preview table shows headers and data rows (10 linhas, 34 colunas)
✅ Frontend: Layout mode radio buttons (Layout existente / Novo layout) present and functional
✅ Frontend: 'No layouts' message shown when CNPJ has no existing layouts
✅ Frontend: New layout config: Nome, Aba select, Linha Cabeçalho, Linha Início Dados inputs
✅ Frontend: Column mapping shows: IDX, CABEÇALHO EXCEL, CAMPO DESTINO, TIPO, AMOSTRA, OBRIG.
✅ Frontend: Campo destino dropdown populated from /api/v1/import-layouts/campos-disponiveis
✅ Frontend: Submit creates layout and lote, shows success toast and redirects
✅ Frontend: /lotes page loads without errors (regression test for layout_id column)
test_credentials: CNPJ: 11222333000181 (valid CNPJ for testing), Email: test@example.com
seed_data_creation: Test data (layout TEST_Layout_E2E and lote PROT-20260308235257-B7EAD629) created and cleaned up during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 features fully tested: (1) POST /api/v1/import-layouts/preview-excel accepts arquivo_base64, nome_aba, linha_cabecalho, linha_inicio_dados, max_linhas and returns abas, aba_selecionada, cabecalhos, linhas, total_linhas, total_colunas. (2) Lotes API now supports layout_id field - can be null or valid layout ID. (3) Frontend upload flow has 3 steps with Excel preview and visual column mapping. The sample file at /app/sample_input.xls has 34 columns and sheet 'CGtmp34'.
